description: 6.46M deregistered passenger cars vs 5.10M registered — the dead fleet outnumbers the living. 1980s cars lasted 17.8 years on average; 2010s cars deregistered after just 6.3y so far.

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" | STATS dead_cars = COUNT(*)
FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS alive_cars = COUNT(*)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS dead = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt", alive = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" | EVAL ratio = 1.0 * dead / alive | KEEP ratio

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1990 AND _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000 | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 60 | STATS avg_lifespan_years = AVG(age)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 2000 AND _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010 | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 60 | STATS avg_lifespan_years = AVG(age)

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 50 | EVAL tier = CASE(age < 5, "<5y", age < 10, "5-9y", age < 15, "10-14y", age < 20, "15-19y", age < 25, "20-24y", age < 30, "25-29y", "30+y") | STATS cars = COUNT(*) BY tier | SORT tier ASC

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL | EVAL dereg_year = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) | WHERE dereg_year >= 1990 AND dereg_year <= 2026 | EVAL year_date = TO_DATETIME(CONCAT(TO_STRING(dereg_year), "-01-01")) | STATS dereg_cars = COUNT(*) BY year_date | SORT year_date ASC

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1960 AND _foerste_registrering_aar < 2026 | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar, decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 60 | STATS cars = COUNT(*), avg_age_yrs = AVG(age), med_age_yrs = MEDIAN(age) BY decade | SORT decade ASC

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= ${year_from} AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= ${year_to} | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS total = COUNT(*), alive = COUNT(*) WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" BY decade | EVAL alive_pct = ROUND(alive * 100.0 / total, 1) | SORT decade ASC

panels.title: Survivorship — Currently Alive Share by Birth Decade

targets.query: FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _drivkraft_primaer IS NOT NULL | STATS dead_cars = COUNT(*) BY fuel = _drivkraft_primaer | SORT dead_cars DESC | LIMIT 10

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1990 | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 60 | STATS dead = COUNT(*), avg_age_yrs = AVG(age) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE dead >= 5000 | SORT avg_age_yrs ASC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1990 | EVAL age = DATE_EXTRACT("year", KoeretoejRegistreringStatusDato) - _foerste_registrering_aar | WHERE age >= 0 AND age < 60 | STATS dead = COUNT(*), avg_age_yrs = AVG(age) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE dead >= 5000 | SORT avg_age_yrs DESC | LIMIT 25

FROM $__index | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Afmeldt" AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword IS NOT NULL | STATS dead_cars = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | SORT dead_cars DESC | LIMIT 25

title: DMR Ghost Fleet (Lifespan & Mortality)
